chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3230 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.14273/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 15.10.2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- This petition was last taken up on 09.08.2024, which is over one year ago. In the last one year, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today despite the lapse of one year none present for the petitioner without intimation, though the name of the petitioner is appearing in the cause list. It appears that the petitioner has lost his interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
